title: Retro
description: A universal retrospective — produced by minih agents, compound skills, and other agentic workflows. One retro per run/session.

schema_version.description: SemVer of the retro schema this document conforms to. Readers MUST reject unknown major versions.

retro_id.description: Unique retro identifier: <ISO 8601 UTC timestamp>-<agent-slug>-<short hex hash>. Example: 2026-05-16T07:30:00Z-myagent-a8f3

agent.description: Slug of the agent that produced this retro. Lowercase kebab-case.

run_id.description: Producer-specific run identifier. Minih uses ISO timestamp format with hyphens. Optional.

plan_id.description: Optional plan/session identifier this retro belongs to. Used for grouping across runs.

summary.description: One-paragraph summary of what the agent did this run. Optional.

system.description: Namespaced system-specific top-level extensions. Readers ignore unknown namespaces.

id.description: Short entry ID, scoped within this retro. Convention: <PREFIX>-<3+ digit number>. Recommended prefixes: DL (difficulty), MW (magic-wand), GFT (gift), INS (insight), COORD (coordination), SUGG (improvement-suggestion), CONF (confusion).

kind.description: Semantic kind of this entry. Determines which sibling fields are meaningful.

description.description: Free-text description of the entry. Required.

target.description: What the entry is about. Conventional values: project | tooling | plan | skill | doc | infra | minih | coordination. Custom values allowed.

severity.description: Recommended for kind=difficulty; meaningless for other kinds.

workaround.description: Optional. What you did to get past the issue (typically for kind=difficulty).

suggested_encoding.description: Optional hint for compound's encoding flow. Free-text. Examples: 'justfile recipe', 'plan-1b plan', 'docs/how article', 'SKILL.md edit'.

system.description: Namespaced per-entry system-specific extensions. Readers ignore unknown namespaces.
